title: Can't get write_firrtl output for design than contains memory.
body:
Automated test case:
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys-tests/tree/master/backends/write_firrtl_mem

In all cases what I tried to use I had this error in the report:  

> ERROR: Unclocked write port 0 on memory top.ram. 

Do I need some special RAM description for write_firrtl or it is a bug?

## Steps to reproduce the issue
top.v:
```
module top
(
	input [7:0] data_a,
	input [6:1] addr_a,
	input we_a, clk,
	output reg [7:0] q_a
);
	// Declare the RAM variable
	reg [7:0] ram[63:0];

	// Port A
	always @ (posedge clk)
	begin
		if (we_a)
		begin
			ram[addr_a] <= data_a;
			q_a <= data_a;
		end
			q_a <= ram[addr_a];
	end

endmodule
```
script:
read_verilog ../top.v
memory_collect
proc
write_firrtl f.f

## Expected behavior

Firrtl backend successfully executed.

## Actual behavior

yosys> write_firrtl f.f

4. Executing FIRRTL backend.

4.1. Executing PMUXTREE pass.
Warning: Initial value (00000000) for (top.q_a) not supported
Warning: Initial value (00000000) for (top.q_b) not supported
ERROR: Unclocked write port 0 on memory top.ram.
